findings.title: Verification cache key may omit attacker-controlled input
findings.summary: The SPECA-like proof attempt cannot establish that all verification-affecting fields are part of the cache-key material.

proofAttempt.map: Relevant code paths include buildCacheKey and verification request parsing.
proofAttempt.prove: The implementation must show that every verification-affecting attacker-controlled field is included in the key material.
proofAttempt.stressTest: Counterexample candidate: two requests differ in an attacker-controlled field that affects verification but share the same cache key.
proofAttempt.report: Treat as a candidate until reviewed by the three-gate security review.
